summary: M1 artifact lake layout & retention policy delivered. Defined runId/sourceId/artifactType partitioning, artifactUri scheme (atm://lake/...), per-type compression defaults (zstd l5), retention tiers (hot/cold/expire), coexistence with canonical export, and runner guards against hardcoded source/general/cleanup strings.

artifacts.description: Layout spec with directory template, artifactUri rules, compression and retention table, coexistence policy with extracted/ canonical export and codex-smoke fixtures.
Machine-readable layout policy. Lists partition levels, artifactTypes, artifactUri scheme, per-type compression and retention, and runner guards. enabledByDefault=false.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: raw page, harvested page, seed, card, anchor, proposal, scoreboard artifactUri rules
compression / archive strategy retains JSONL export mirror
acceptanceMapping.evidence: policy.compression.* defaults; spec section 'JSONL canonical mirror 仍掛在 .../extracted/'

acceptanceMapping.criterion: paths and retention read from policy, no hardcoded strings
